## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss 409A valuation results and clarify details for asset transfer and Series A funding.](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Post-money enterprise value: $48.846M, per share value: $5.81 (lower than expected $7.7)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Contributed assets value as of Jan 23: $22.5M (incl. $200k cash)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - Series A funding: $12M, resulting in QSBS-eligible valuation (\<$50M post-money)
  - [Pre-money enterprise value calculation needed for 1202 valuation (to be provided later)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

## Topics

### 409A Valuation Results

  - [Post-money enterprise value: $48.846M](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Per share value: $5.81 (significantly lower than expected $7.7)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Valuation date: Feb 26, 2025 (yesterday's date, to be maintained)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Two separate reports forthcoming: 409A valuation and asset valuation](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Asset Transfer Details

  - [Date of asset transfer: January 23, 2025 (confirmed after initial confusion)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Value of contributed assets: $22.5M (includes $200k cash transfer)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Valuation method: Projected future cash flows from transferred assets, present valued](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Independent from $80M term sheet target; not reverse-engineered](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Series A Funding Impact

  - [Series A amount: $12M](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - Post-money valuation (\<$50M) qualifies for QSBS treatment
  - [Pre-money enterprise value calculation requested for 1202 valuation purposes](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Board approval needed for pro forma post-money enterprise value](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Valuation Methodology Discussion

  - [Asset valuation separate from $80M term sheet target](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Not using reverse engineering or back-solving approach](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Considers projected future value of transferred assets](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Term sheet not factored into Jan 23 valuation (as it didn't exist then)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nainesh to email valuation details to all participants](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Nainesh to provide pre-money enterprise value calculation (target: tomorrow morning)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Complete and send full valuation reports (409A and asset valuation)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Board to approve pro forma post-money enterprise value](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Proceed with closing (may extend into the next day)](https://fathom.video/share/TK9Tw2aExpPXkSdnJjxa_vJTMbEvnzw4?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
